raw_consumer_statement: Barclays credit card company refused to fix the issue with a wrong charge on my Jet Blue Plus credit card. I disputed a charge {$490.00} from XXXX XXXX because I cancelled the flight ticket online on XXXX XXXX website. But I didnt get a refund to my credit card as was promised by XXXX XXXX XXXX I submitted a proof of the flight cancellation and supporting document to the Barclays credit card dispute department. However, they refused to fix the issue. I request a credit for the cancelled charge.
